message:
test(proptest): PAC-Bayesian backpressure invariants — 23 properties (ft-l5em3.3)

Property-based verification: Gaussian posterior (KL non-negativity, variance
shrinkage, convex mean, confidence bound symmetry), controller (severity/risk
bounds, determinism, tracking correctness), starvation guard (monotonicity),
severity curves (monotonicity, range). 23 properties × 200-500 cases each.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
